title: Downscaled 4x
description: A resourcepack that downscales all minecraft textures by 4 times
body:
This resourcepack makes all minecraft textures downscaled by 4x. Downscaling a 16x16 (default for blocks and items) texture by 4x will make it 4x4 pixels. Downscaled textures have less details and do take less V-RAM, but it probably won't do any optimization, so this is just a visual thing.

[Downscaled 2x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/downscaled)
